variables.name: proxmox_node
variables.description: Proxmox node name where the VM will be created.

variables.name: vm_name
variables.description: VM hostname and Proxmox display name.

variables.name: template_name
variables.description: Name of the Proxmox VM template to clone (Ubuntu cloud-init image).

variables.name: storage_pool
variables.description: Proxmox storage pool for the VM disk.

variables.name: ip_address
variables.description: Static IP address with CIDR prefix (e.g. 192.168.1.100/24). Use 'dhcp' for DHCP.

variables.name: gateway
variables.description: Default gateway IP. Required when ip_address is not 'dhcp'.

variables.name: ssh_public_key
variables.description: SSH public key injected via cloud-init for the default user.
